knowledgeBase.title: Harness-first execution must stay explicit
knowledgeBase.text: DeerFlow-style strong execution bases should keep broker transport, queue, lease, retry, failover, and authority evidence visible in runtime output.

knowledgeBase.title: Independent agent access should stay first-class
knowledgeBase.text: OpenHanako-style independent agent access requires host-layer, session, desk, plugin, and bridge capabilities to remain explicit rather than hidden behind a single host runtime.

knowledgeBase.title: Provider registry should stay visible
knowledgeBase.text: A strong standalone harness should make provider registry and runtime adapter boundaries explicit in output and review.

knowledgeBase.title: Sandbox and tool runtime need evidence
knowledgeBase.text: Reviewers should expect workspace sandbox, tool runtime evidence, and tool-runs.json rather than only narrative claims.

knowledgeBase.title: Critic can trigger replan
knowledgeBase.text: If retrieval-backed evidence is missing, critic should return revise and ask executor to补 retrieval evidence before judge finalizes.

knowledgeBase.title: Streaming should be observable
knowledgeBase.text: A strong harness should expose chunk-level streaming evidence and persist stream events for later inspection and resume.

knowledgeBase.title: Broker transport should be visible
knowledgeBase.text: A stronger standalone harness should route execution through a broker job API, keep broker events, and expose remote-style transport evidence in runtime output.

knowledgeBase.title: Lease and retry should be observable
knowledgeBase.text: A durable broker should expose lease acquired/expired/released and retry events, and queue state should survive as files under runtime/.

durableArtifacts.title: PLAN.md
durableArtifacts.summary: 已完成规划：帮我做一个更像 deer-flow / OpenHanako 的 AI Team 开源最小样板，至少具备多角色编排、workspace、artifact、registry、memory、report。
